description_long: This range hood features a broad, gently curved canopy with a smooth white finish, framed by natural wood trim at both the base and the top. The base is wide and rectangular, providing a sturdy visual foundation, while the upper section narrows into a vertical shaft, also bordered by wood. The wood trim has a light, natural grain, contrasting with the sleek, matte white surface of the main body. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible controls, filters, or lighting fixtures on the exterior. The venting appears to be directed upward through the top shaft, which is typical for wall-mounted kitchen range hoods. The object is solid and robust, likely intended for installation above a cooking area in a residential or commercial kitchen.
description: A modern range hood with a wide, curved white canopy and natural wood trim at the base and top, featuring a minimalist design with no visible controls or fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved white canopy framed by wood trim, with the vertical shaft rising centrally.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the canopy and the thickness of the wood trim, showing the smooth transition from base to shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the canopy and shaft, with the wood trim wrapping around the entire base and top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the profile of the curved canopy and the vertical shaft.
attribute_vent_placement: Vent is oriented at the top of the vertical shaft, with no other visible vent openings.
